source: Seed BTC news data; GitHub Actions refreshes this file daily from Google News RSS.

forecasts.summary: Latest Bitcoin coverage will refresh automatically from Google News RSS when the page opens.
Bitcoin ETF headlines are tracked because inflows and outflows can quickly affect BTC market sentiment.
BTC market and price news is tracked to catch major rallies, selloffs, liquidity shifts, and trading updates.
Bitcoin regulation and policy headlines are tracked because legal changes can reshape market risk.
Bitcoin mining news is tracked for hash rate, miner selling pressure, energy policy, and production updates.
Corporate Bitcoin treasury headlines are tracked because company purchases and sales can influence sentiment.
Exchange-related BTC headlines are tracked for liquidity, custody, listings, outages, and market access changes.
Bitcoin adoption headlines are tracked because payment, custody, and institutional access can shift long-term demand.
Macro headlines involving rates, dollar strength, liquidity, and risk appetite are tracked for BTC context.
Security and custody headlines are tracked because hacks, wallet issues, and exchange incidents can move sentiment.
